description.value:
A plain gold band engraved with an hourglass so fine it can only be seen in direct sunlight. It fits any finger perfectly. It always has.

Curse. While worn, the wearer does not age. This sounds like a gift. It is not. When the ring is removed - willingly or otherwise - the wearer immediately ages a number of years equal to the total time the ring was worn, to a minimum of one year per week. Magical aging, not biological: a greater restoration can reverse it.

unidentified.description: A plain gold band. It slips onto any finger as if made for it. You notice no difference when wearing it.

cursedMeta.decoyAppearance: A plain gold band. Fits perfectly. Warm to the touch.
cursedMeta.trueNature: Prevents aging while worn. When removed, wearer ages by time worn (magical). Greater restoration reverses it.

curse.name: Borrowed Time
curse.description: While worn the wearer does not age. When the ring is removed they immediately age by the total time it was worn (magical aging; greater restoration can reverse it).

hints: Skin at the ring line looks a shade too smooth, as if years forgot to touch it.

escalation.effect: Minor aches vanish while the band is on; mirrors feel slightly off.
